title: Books As Companion | Essay Explanation In Hindi
description:
Few people think of a book as something that talks back — but E.V. Lucas's quietly profound essay *Books as Companion* argues that the right book, at the right moment, does exactly that, filling loneliness with conversation that never exhausts or judges you. Prescribed across BA English Honours and DU SOL curricula, this essay explores the themes of friendship and solitude through Lucas's warm, unhurried prose that feels less like literature and more like advice from someone who has actually lived. If you have ever reached for a book when human company failed you, Lucas wrote this for you.
